title: Where Thistles Drink the Sun
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When children born under a blood-red moon begin speaking in tongues and driving their parents mad, a disgraced herbalist must return to the thorn-woven groves she fled decades ago to find the root of the curse.
long_description: When children born under a blood-red moon begin speaking in tongues and driving their parents mad, a disgraced herbalist must return to the thorn-woven groves she fled decades ago to find the root of the curse.
